nasb.text: Now Joab was over the whole army of Israel, and Benaiah the son of Jehoiada was over the Cherethites and the Pelethites;

esv.text: Now Joab was in command of all the army of Israel; and Benaiah the son of Jehoiada was in command of the Cherethites and the Pelethites;

cnv.text: 約押作以色列所有軍隊的統帥。耶何耶大的兒子比拿雅統轄基利提人和比利提人；

ccb.text: 约押负责统率以色列全军；耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅统辖基利提人和比利提人；
